description: gatherBurp is a powerful BurpSuite security testing extension with multiple vulnerability detection features.
notes: 【主要功能】: gatherBurp is a powerful BurpSuite security testing extension with multiple vulnerability detection features.
【适用场景】: 漏洞检测、安全审计、Burp Suite安全测试
【技术特点】: 基于Java开发，需配合Burp Suite使用
